ddls:
CREATE TABLE "newspapers" (
  "newspaper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newspaper */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the newspaper */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the newspaper was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the newspaper's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the newspaper */,
  "editor_in_chief" TEXT /* Name of the newspaper's editor-in-chief */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the newspaper's owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("newspaper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circulation_data" (
  "circulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circulation record */,
  "newspaper_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the newspaper */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the circulation data */,
  "daily_circulation" INTEGER /* Number of daily circulations */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., print, digital) */,
  "subscription_rate" TEXT /* Rate of the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circulation_data_newspaper_id FOREIGN KEY ("newspaper_id") REFERENCES newspapers ("newspaper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pulitzer_prizes" (
  "pulitzer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pulitzer Prize record */,
  "newspaper_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the newspaper */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the Pulitzer Prize was awarded */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the Pulitzer Prize */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the Pulitzer Prize (winner or finalist) */,
  "entry_title" TEXT /* Title of the entry */,
  "jury_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the jury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pulitzer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pulitzer_prizes_newspaper_id FOREIGN KEY ("newspaper_id") REFERENCES newspapers ("newspaper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circulation_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circulation change record */,
  "newspaper_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the newspaper */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in daily circulation from 2004 to 2013 */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change (e.g., economic downturn, shift to digital) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circulation_changes_newspaper_id FOREIGN KEY ("newspaper_id") REFERENCES newspapers ("newspaper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pulitzer_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pulitzer Prize count record */,
  "newspaper_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the newspaper */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year for the Pulitzer Prize count */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year for the Pulitzer Prize count */,
  "winner_count" INTEGER /* Number of Pulitzer Prize wins */,
  "finalist_count" INTEGER /* Number of Pulitzer Prize finalist positions */,
  "total_winning_categories" INTEGER /* Total number of categories won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pulitzer_counts_newspaper_id FOREIGN KEY ("newspaper_id") REFERENCES newspapers ("newspaper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, journalist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view report, download data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "newspaper_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the newspaper */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., circulation trends, Pulitzer Prize summary) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_newspaper_id FOREIGN KEY ("newspaper_id") REFERENCES newspapers ("newspaper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report was downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the department manager */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the department's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the request (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_generation" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report generation event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report generation process */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report generation process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report generation (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "generation_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to generate the report (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_generation_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
